fields.name: reviewerFirm
fields.exampleValue: Placeholder Security Assurance Firm Ltd (EMULATED — not engaged)
fields.whyRequired: An independent review is required before a banking customer accepts the platform into production.
fields.validationCommand: Confirm the engagement letter / contract with the reviewing firm exists and covers this release.
fields.expectedSuccessfulOutput: A signed engagement exists naming the firm and the assessed release version.

fields.name: scope
fields.exampleValue: Placeholder scope: web app (OWASP ASVS), Entra OIDC flow, SQL Server data-at-rest, IIS hardening, Data Protection key ring, terminal/command sandbox.
fields.realProvider: Agreed statement of work with the reviewing firm
fields.whyRequired: Defines exactly what was assessed so gaps in coverage are explicit.
fields.validationCommand: Compare the SOW scope to the deployed components and list any unassessed components.
fields.expectedSuccessfulOutput: Scope covers all internet/identity-facing and data-handling components with no unjustified exclusions.

fields.name: reportReference
fields.whyRequired: Provides an auditable reference to the actual findings report.
fields.validationCommand: Locate the referenced report in the secure document store and verify its integrity hash.
fields.expectedSuccessfulOutput: Report exists, reference resolves, and integrity hash matches the firm's delivered artifact.

fields.name: findingsCount
fields.exampleValue: { "critical": null, "high": null, "medium": null, "low": null } (EMULATED — null = unknown, no review performed)
fields.whyRequired: Critical/high findings must be zero (or remediated) before production go-live.
fields.validationCommand: Read the findings summary; confirm critical and high counts and that each is remediated or risk-accepted by the operator.
fields.expectedSuccessfulOutput: No open critical or high findings; all such findings closed or formally risk-accepted.
